# monstera

A cross-platform CLI to quickly retrieve system information to make issue management easier.

## Install:

Install `monstera vX.Y.Z` (this release) through the following commands.

| macOS/Linux | Windows |
| --- | --- |
| `pip3 install monstera==X.Y.Z` | `pip install monstera==X.Y.Z` |

If you want to install the latest release.

| macOS/Linux | Windows |
| --- | --- |
| `pip3 install monstera` | `pip install monstera` |

## PyPI:
You can view this release of `monstera` on PyPI [here](https://pypi.org/project/monstera/X.Y.Z/).
